title: Property Consultant - Rustomjee Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Rustomjee Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
